decision: Issue 7 (daax-web #73): add GET /api/mcp/status route that reads .mcp.json from cwd (primary) or ~/.claude/claude_desktop_config.json (fallback); returns {servers:string[]} always at HTTP 200. Add McpStatusBar component fetching that route; renders one chip per server as next/link to /mcp; empty state 'No MCP servers configured'. Mount above agent launcher grid in app/ai-coding/page.tsx empty-state div.
rejected: discoverAllMcps() parity (rev4-rev5): spec says .mcp.json+desktop fallback; codex kept finding more sources but none blocked DoD. Codex generated infinite parity findings that are out of scope for this issue — the spec explicitly defines the two sources. The simple implementation exactly satisfies all DoD tests.
evidence: 10 tests all pass (6 route + 4 component); typecheck clean; lint 0 errors; format clean on all new files.
note: Pre-existing prettier warnings on TerminalManager.tsx, host-docker.ts, backlog-tasks-route.test.ts intentionally left — out of scope for this issue.
